differences.title: 1. DEVELOPMENT SERVER
differences.leftDesc: Leverages native browser ESM for instant server start.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles code before serving, leading to slower starts.

differences.title: 2. BUILD SPEED
differences.leftDesc: Significantly faster build times due to esbuild.
differences.rightDesc: Can be slow for large projects with complex configurations.

differences.title: 3. DEPENDENCY HANDLING
differences.leftDesc: Pre-bundles dependencies with esbuild on first run.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles all project code and dependencies together.

differences.title: 4. CONFIGURATION
differences.leftDesc: Simple and opinionated configuration, often works out-of-the-box.
differences.rightDesc: Highly configurable but can be complex to set up.

differences.title: 5. HOT MODULE REPLACEMENT (HMR)
differences.leftDesc: Leverages native ESM for faster HMR updates.

differences.title: 6. ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Rapidly growing ecosystem and community support.
differences.rightDesc: Vast ecosystem, extensive plugins, and long-standing community.

differences.title: 7. PLUGINS
differences.leftDesc: Uses Rollup for plugin system, supporting existing Rollup plugins.
differences.rightDesc: Has a dedicated and extensive plugin API.
